# Extracao: transcription_pdf_05-10X_Email_Marketing_-_Mailchimp_Broadcast_Email_Checklist

- **Fonte:** transcription_pdf_05-10X_Email_Marketing_-_Mailchimp_Broadcast_Email_Checklist.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Use This Checklist For Every New Mailchimp Campaign!
Once in Mailchimp Dashboard, Click “Campaigns”, then “Create Campaign”
Once in the New Campaign View, Click “Email”, then “Regular”
Choose a Campaign Name that is relative to the promotion you are pushing
“To” section: Choose the list or individual contacts that this campaign is
intended for
“From” section: Ensure that the email address this campaign is being
sent from is correct
“Subject” section: Write a Subject Line that will compel contacts to
open your email
Optionally include short preview text to incentivize opens
“Content” Section: Choose your preferred email layout, depending on what
content you would like inside of your email
Write your email text and include any images you would like using
Mailchimp’s native content blocks
Be sure to link any Call to Actions/Images by highlighting the text, clicking the
“Link” button in the text editing interface, and then entering the link that
the CTA will lead to
SETUP
Test emails sent and visually inspected on desktop and mobile
Test all email links (including images) to ensure they work
Make sure appropriate lists are included/suppressed
PRE-SEND CHECKLIST
When complete… HIT THAT SEND BUTTON
MAILCHIMP BROADCAST
EMAIL CHECKLIST
